productDisplayName: Lotto Men Play Off White Violet Shoe
description: Value for money and stylish in comfort, the lotto Play Off III firm ground football shoe is a great footwear for those who like a rough game. Replete with water repellent and impact protection features, these Play Off III FG sneakers allow your feet to flex perfectly, offering great elastic return of energy.Upper Water-repellent premium plus upper to keep your boots in best possible shape Upper stitched directly to the outsole for increased durability and protection from blistering Knitted lace for extended durability and snug Fit Cushioned collar and padded tongue for added comfort and snug fit Midsole EVA injected midsole for lightweight comfort and enhanced shock absorption Removable footbed that can accommodate an orthotic Outsole Rearfoot shock-off feature to cuhsion the foot during a hard round of hard ground football Hard rubber spikes lined below the heel and toe counters to enhance performance on hard ground PuntoFlex technology to allow the foot to flex correctly and enhance elastic return of foot Wash careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
